caption: A man sits at a dark wooden desk in a studio setting, wearing a black sweatshirt with "BOSS" printed in large gold letters and a white baseball cap. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeating logo consisting of five gold stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk, there is a black container with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT". The man remains in a consistent position throughout the sequence, slightly turned toward the microphone, with minor movements of his head and facial expressions as he speaks. The camera angle and the surrounding equipment, including a black case to the left, remain static across the frames.
